title: The Truth Behind Sanji’s Debt to Zeff
description: On pages 9–12, Sanji’s past with Zeff is revealed through their starvation on a rock, explaining the debt that binds him to the Baratie.
scene: The flashback strips away the noise of battle and focuses on hunger, sacrifice, and the dream of creating a restaurant where no one is denied food.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Captain, we have to pull back right away! The coming storm's much bigger than we thought!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: load up all of the loot back to our boat!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: W-What're you doing!? It's just a stupid little kid!

summary: This part gives emotional meaning to Sanji’s choices: Zeff’s sacrifice explains why feeding the hungry is sacred to him.
